changeSet.author: JuliWolf
changeSet.sql: insert into action_type (action_type_id, action_type_name) values ('d3bfacc2-9438-4296-a149-cfc6287e627d', 'GRANT') ON CONFLICT DO nothing; insert into action_type (action_type_id, action_type_name) values ('5b197bb3-5140-4acf-b576-7870205b4342', 'REVOKE') ON CONFLICT DO nothing;
